stories.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.simple_summary: Instagram's leader says he won't remove AI-generated content from the app, but says users who don't want to see it shouldn't have to see it in their feeds.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you may get options to hide AI content you don't like — this is about giving you control over what you see.

stories.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.simple_summary: A solar energy company wants to pay homeowners to put small computer boxes in their homes. These boxes would help run AI systems for the company.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have space in your home and want extra income, this could be a small income opportunity — though you should check if the payment is worth it and what it costs to run.

stories.title: SK Hynix hits the U.S. stock market as demand for memory chips soars amid AI frenzy
stories.simple_summary: A computer memory chip company from South Korea just started selling shares on the U.S. stock market because AI companies need lots of computer memory.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: AI in Spintronics Market Size to Skyrocket: Predicted $7.11 Billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 30.9%
stories.simple_summary: Someone is predicting that AI used for a type of technology called spintronics will grow to a $7 billion industry by 2030.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a prediction about a specialized technology field — it's too technical and early-stage to affect most small businesses or everyday life now.

stories.title: Sovereign AI May Mean State-Backed Models and Political Tensions
stories.simple_summary: Governments are starting to create their own AI systems instead of relying on American companies, which could cause political disagreements.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly about government and international relations — it may eventually affect which AI tools are available in different countries, but no action needed from you right now.

stories.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI made a newer version of its AI system (GPT-5.6) that will power Microsoft's work software like email and spreadsheets.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Microsoft Office products at work, they may get smarter AI help — but this is mostly a business partnership announcement.

stories.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft's pollution and emissions went up 25 percent last year, mostly because they're building huge facilities to power AI systems.
stories.why_it_matters: This shows that AI's environmental cost is real and growing — if you care about climate impact, this is worth knowing about.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
stories.simple_summary: A top executive at OpenAI is stepping down from her full-time job because of a health condition, after taking medical leave.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people watching OpenAI's leadership — it's company news but doesn't affect ordinary users of AI.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.simple_summary: The same executive from story 7 is leaving her full-time role at OpenAI and will work part-time instead due to a medical condition.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a repeat of story 7 from a different news source — company leadership news that doesn't affect ordinary users.

stories.title: New Fed task force members share Chairman Kevin Warsh's embrace of AI
stories.simple_summary: New members of a U.S. government task force about banking support AI development.
stories.why_it_matters: This is about government policy and banking regulation — important for big financial institutions but doesn't require action from small business owners.

stories.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI released its newest family of AI models (called GPT-5.6) that they say work better at things like cybersecurity.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a product update for businesses and developers who use OpenAI's systems — most consumers will only notice if their AI tools get better.

stories.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
stories.simple_summary: An AI startup used its own AI system to manage raising $100 million in funding, showing that the AI system can actually do real work.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly a demonstration for investors and tech companies — it shows AI can handle complex business tasks, but it's mainly relevant to people building AI companies.
